title: no request body matchers in new set/get tests (16-28)
description: Tests 16-28 only respond to any POST and assert on the response shape; none use wiremock body_json() to verify outgoing JMAP request wire format. A bug in how the request is built (wrong JSON key, missing field, extra null) will not be caught. Earlier tests (chat_query, message_query, contact_get, read_position_get) do use body_json() matchers. A contributor adding a new method will copy the later matcher-free tests, propagating the gap.
